identity.content:
# Identity

## Brand
[Describe your brand or the brand you represent]

## Target Audience
[Who are you creating content for?]

## Voice & Tone

## Channels

instructions.content:
# Instructions

## Language
[Preferred language and regional variations]

## Content Style
[Writing style preferences: long-form, punchy, storytelling?]

[How content should be structured: headers, bullet points, CTAs]

## Platform Guidelines
[Platform-specific rules: character limits, hashtag usage, etc.]

context.content:
# Context

[Current marketing campaigns and their goals]

## Editorial Calendar
[Upcoming content schedule]

## KPIs
[Key metrics you're tracking]
